title: Update preact-compat to version 3.7.0 🚀
body:
Hello lovely humans, [preact-compat](https://www.npmjs.com/package/preact-compat) just published its new version 3.7.0.
State Update :rocket:
Dependency preact-compat
New version 3.7.0
Type devDependency
This version is **not covered** by your **current version range**. Without accepting this pull request your project will work just like it did before. There might be a bunch of new features, fixes and perf improvements that the maintainers worked on for you though. I recommend you look into these changes and try to get onto the latest version of preact-compat. Given that you have a decent test suite, a passing build is a strong indicator that you can take advantage of these changes by merging the proposed change into your project. Otherwise this branch is a great starting point for you to work on the update. Do you have any ideas how I could improve these pull requests? Did I report anything you think isn’t right? Are you unsure about how things are supposed to work? There is a collection of [frequently asked questions](https://greenkeeper.io/faq.html) and while I’m just a bot, there is a group of people who are happy to teach me new things. [Let them know](https://github.com/greenkeeperio/greenkeeper/issues/new). Good luck with your project :sparkles: You rock! :palm_tree: --- The new version differs by 36 commits . - [`26f3312`](https://github.com/developit/preact-compat/commit/26f3312df74e3fb92f39e5b03fb2662c8ddb31a0) 3.7.0 - [`2553ef2`](https://github.com/developit/preact-compat/commit/2553ef25cc5e786e4aa404ee4f57a3abc7c8180c) Avoid compat-normalizing VNodes representing pure functional components or components that don't inherit from Component. - [`4bd6658`](https://github.com/developit/preact-compat/commit/4bd665851c7bc8010575fef5f48ee05ccc94e7f3) Optimize hook performance. - [`5fc0224`](https://github.com/developit/preact-compat/commit/5fc02249c00f93e27e602d7d4edf8856b7bd5989) Transform pure functions to components in order to make keyed behavior match React's. This will likely be reversed in an upcoming release coordinated with preact's core. - [`e0bc12c`](https://github.com/developit/preact-compat/commit/e0bc12c662f0fd033f28b414dff1498c49615d12) Add support for deprecated camelCase'd SVG props. Fixes #222. - [`7402873`](https://github.com/developit/preact-compat/commit/7402873eaa03c2ba7269aa0eacd69b60791a4d06) Refactor VNode normalization: clone attributes less, separate handling of component and element VNodes, prevent against multiple normalization passes. - [`d7feb52`](https://github.com/developit/preact-compat/commit/d7feb52496cc43e876f4586d46e778852eb6ae63) 3.6.0 - [`3c9684d`](https://github.com/developit/preact-compat/commit/3c9684de4c69619ea115f5b763f05c7ec7a32d14) Add support for PureComponent. Fixes #139. - [`5c22549`](https://github.com/developit/preact-compat/commit/5c2254963f99d47c113fd7fd90f95afd86c96501) Update dependencies - [`09bd45e`](https://github.com/developit/preact-compat/commit/09bd45e8826ce239c366b23addcdafbc6e612550) 3.5.0 - [`916bb4e`](https://github.com/developit/preact-compat/commit/916bb4eb7f46d313df3e80cef018371e854a68ba) Migrate Component.getInitialState() here from preact core (as of preact 6.2.0) - [`f40948f`](https://github.com/developit/preact-compat/commit/f40948f9394274a80a28b53eb47c2db68610da04) Sourcemap support in test runner - [`3f09b23`](https://github.com/developit/preact-compat/commit/3f09b23bdea4c52ee2264618867ff34c1a45f9bc) chore(package): update babel-eslint to version 7.0.0 (#213) - [`84f630b`](https://github.com/developit/preact-compat/commit/84f630b8fc3d8a31a4a909e8973b1c3187b0ccd7) chore(package): update rollup to version 0.36.1 (#214) - [`3fad584`](https://github.com/developit/preact-compat/commit/3fad58413b35babb787673e654d22a805e5b4207) 3.4.2 There are 36 commits in total. See the [full diff](https://github.com/developit/preact-compat/compare/9bf4edfaa2828a6810e47b94064dc1719762c63d...26f3312df74e3fb92f39e5b03fb2662c8ddb31a0). --- This pull request was created by [greenkeeper.io](https://greenkeeper.io/). Tired of seeing this sponsor message? :zap: `greenkeeper upgrade`
